name: Sûldreth
personality: This × cancel-eyed dragon wears a crown like a merge commit: inevitable, slightly heavy, and marking the end of a long process. It will outlast any dependency update cycle with serene dignity, and it has nothing particularly biting to say about the ones that broke staging.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
